name: codex
description: OpenAI Codex CLI - AI coding agent for the terminal

options.name: --remote
options.description: Connect the TUI to a remote app server websocket endpoint

options.name: --remote-auth-token-env
options.description: Environment variable containing the bearer token for a remote app server

name: -i
--image
options.description: Attach image file(s) to the initial prompt

options.name: --oss
options.description: Use the local open source model provider (Ollama or LM Studio)

options.name: --local-provider
options.description: Specify which local provider to use with --oss

name: -s
--sandbox
options.description: Sandbox policy for model-generated shell commands

name: -a
--ask-for-approval
options.description: When the model requires human approval before executing a command

options.name: --full-auto
options.description: Low-friction sandboxed automatic execution (workspace-write sandbox, on-request approvals)

name: --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox
--yolo
options.description: Skip all confirmation prompts and execute without sandboxing

name: -C
--cd
options.description: Set the working directory for the agent

options.name: --add-dir
options.description: Grant additional directories write access alongside the main workspace

options.name: --no-alt-screen
options.description: Disable alternate screen mode for the TUI

args.name: PROMPT
args.description: Optional user prompt to start the session

e
subcommands.description: Run Codex non-interactively

--image

name: -C
--cd
options.description: Set the workspace root before executing the task

options.name: --skip-git-repo-check
options.description: Allow running outside a Git repository

options.description: Additional writable directories alongside the primary workspace

options.name: --ephemeral
options.description: Run without persisting session files to disk

options.name: --output-schema
options.description: Path to a JSON Schema file describing the expected final response shape

options.name: --json

--output-last-message
options.description: Write the assistant's final message to a file

options.description: Resume the most recent session without specifying an ID

name: -i
--image
options.description: Attach image(s) to the prompt sent after resuming

--output-last-message

options.description: Optional commit title to display in the review summary

options.name: --with-api-key
options.description: Read the API key from stdin

subcommands.description: Show login status

subcommands.description: Remove stored authentication credentials

subcommands.name: mcp
subcommands.description: Manage external MCP servers for Codex

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List configured MCP servers

options.name: --json
options.description: Output the configured servers as JSON

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Display an MCP server configuration

args.name: NAME
args.description: Name of the MCP server to display

options.name: --json
options.description: Output the server configuration as JSON

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add an MCP server configuration

args.name: NAME
args.description: Name for the MCP server configuration

options.name: --env
options.description: Environment variables to set when launching the server (KEY=VALUE)

options.name: --url
options.description: URL for a streamable HTTP MCP server

options.name: --bearer-token-env-var
options.description: Environment variable to read for a bearer token

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove an MCP server configuration

args.name: NAME
args.description: Name of the MCP server configuration to remove

subcommands.name: login
subcommands.description: Authenticate with an MCP server via OAuth

args.name: NAME
args.description: Name of the MCP server to authenticate with

options.name: --scopes
options.description: Comma-separated list of OAuth scopes to request

subcommands.name: logout
subcommands.description: Deauthenticate from an MCP server

args.name: NAME
args.description: Name of the MCP server to deauthenticate

subcommands.name: mcp-server
subcommands.description: Start Codex as an MCP server (stdio)

subcommands.name: app-server
subcommands.description: [experimental] Run the app server or related tooling

options.name: --ws-auth
options.description: Websocket auth mode for non-loopback listeners

options.name: --ws-token-file
options.description: Absolute path to the capability-token file

options.name: --ws-shared-secret-file
options.description: Absolute path to the shared secret file for signed JWT bearer tokens

options.name: --ws-issuer
options.description: Expected issuer for signed JWT bearer tokens

options.name: --ws-audience
options.description: Expected audience for signed JWT bearer tokens

options.name: --ws-max-clock-skew-seconds
options.description: Maximum clock skew when validating signed JWT bearer tokens

subcommands.name: generate-ts
subcommands.description: [experimental] Generate TypeScript bindings for the app server protocol

name: -o
--out
options.description: Output directory where .ts files will be written

name: -p
--prettier
options.description: Path to the Prettier executable to format generated files

options.name: --experimental
options.description: Include experimental methods and fields in the generated output

subcommands.name: generate-json-schema
subcommands.description: [experimental] Generate JSON Schema for the app server protocol

name: -o
--out
options.description: Output directory where the schema bundle will be written

options.name: --experimental
options.description: Include experimental methods and fields in the generated output

subcommands.description: Generate shell completion scripts

args.name: SHELL
args.description: Shell to generate completions for

seatbelt
subcommands.description: Run a command under Seatbelt (macOS only)

args.description: Full command args to run under seatbelt

name: linux
landlock
subcommands.description: Run a command under the Linux sandbox (bubblewrap by default)

args.description: Full command args to run under the Linux sandbox

subcommands.description: Run a command under Windows restricted token (Windows only)

args.description: Full command args to run under Windows restricted token sandbox

name: cloud
cloud-tasks
subcommands.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Browse tasks from Codex Cloud and apply changes locally

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Submit a new Codex Cloud task without launching the TUI

args.name: QUERY
args.description: Task prompt to run in Codex Cloud

options.name: --branch
options.description: Git branch to run in Codex Cloud (defaults to current branch)

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Show the status of a Codex Cloud task

args.name: TASK_ID
args.description: Codex Cloud task identifier to inspect

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List Codex Cloud tasks

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of tasks to return (1-20)

options.name: --cursor
options.description: Pagination cursor returned by a previous call

options.name: --json
options.description: Emit JSON instead of plain text

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.description: Apply the diff for a Codex Cloud task locally

args.name: TASK_ID
args.description: Codex Cloud task identifier to apply

subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.description: Show the unified diff for a Codex Cloud task

args.name: TASK_ID
args.description: Codex Cloud task identifier to display

args.description: Feature key to update (e.g. unified_exec)
